---
title: "Shiny Apps — #equilibria"
description: "Eighty interactive Shiny applications for exploring game theory, statistics, AI/ML, and more."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.lead}
**80 INTERACTIVE APPS · 8 DOMAINS**
:::

# Shiny Apps

Explore game theory, statistics, AI/ML, and more through interactive Shiny applications. Each app has a paired tutorial explaining the underlying concepts.

## Filter by domain

::: {#app-filter}
:::

## Apps

::: {.app-grid}

::: {.app-card}
### [2x2 Nash Equilibrium Explorer](tutorials/two-by-two-nash-explorer-tutorial/index.qmd)

::: {.topic-card-label}
GT CORE · TIER 1
:::

Enter any 2x2 payoff matrix and instantly see pure and mixed-strategy Nash equilibria, best-response correspondences, and expected payoffs.
:::

::: {.app-card}
### [Prisoner's Dilemma Tournament](tutorials/prisoners-dilemma-tournament-tutorial/index.qmd)

::: {.topic-card-label}
GT CORE · TIER 1
:::

Run Axelrod-style round-robin tournaments with configurable strategies, noise, and population dynamics.
:::

::: {.app-card}
### [Spatial PD Lattice Visualizer](tutorials/spatial-prisoners-dilemma-lattice-tutorial/index.qmd)

::: {.topic-card-label}
GT CORE · TIER 1
:::

Watch cooperation and defection patterns emerge on a 2D lattice in real time.
:::

::: {.app-card}
### [Replicator Dynamics on RPS Simplex](tutorials/replicator-dynamics-rps-simplex-tutorial/index.qmd)

::: {.topic-card-label}
GT CORE · TIER 1
:::

Visualize replicator dynamics trajectories on the 3-strategy simplex.
:::

::: {.app-card}
### [Distribution Explorer](tutorials/distribution-explorer-tutorial/index.qmd)

::: {.topic-card-label}
STATS & ML · TIER 1
:::

Explore PDF, CDF, and quantile functions for all major probability distributions.
:::

::: {.app-card}
### [World Bank Country Comparison](tutorials/world-bank-country-comparison-tutorial/index.qmd)

::: {.topic-card-label}
PUBLIC APIS · TIER 1
:::

Compare economic indicators across countries using live World Bank data.
:::

:::

*More apps will be added as tutorials are published. See the [full app catalog](../PLAN.md) for the complete roadmap of 80 applications.*
